src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Removed extension of the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.x standards required for Java 21 ecosystems.
Replaced the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support method-level security in modern Spring Security.
Replaced the deprecated AuthenticationManagerBuilder configuration with an explicit DaoAuthenticationProvider bean.
Replaced the implicit AuthenticationManager from WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with an explicit bean derived from AuthenticationConfiguration.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: @Bean public AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(AuthenticationConfiguration config) throws Exception { return config.getAuthenticationManager(); }

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean definition using the new lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { ... return http.build(); }

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Updated authorization configuration from the deprecated authorizeRequests/antMatchers to authorizeHttpRequests/requestMatchers.
Updated headers configuration to use the new lambda-based API for frame options.
